parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'BayFlow <hello@bayflow.com>', to: [$json.email], subject: 'Welcome to BayFlow!', html: $json.welcomeEmailHtml }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, name: $json.name, business_id: $json.businessId, plan: $json.plan, signup_date: $json.signupDate, welcome_email_sent: $json.welcomeEmailSent, drip_emails_sent: $json.dripEmailsSent, status: $json.status }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', email: $('Parse Signup Data').first().json.email, welcomeEmailSent: $('Build Drip Queue Entry').first().json.welcomeEmailSent, dripQueueSaved: !$json.error }) }}
